name: OLD SECOND BANCORP INC
business: Old Second Bancorp, Inc. is a bank holding company for Old Second National Bank, offering deposit products, trust and wealth management services, and lending services including commercial, residential, and consumer loans. It operates 55 banking centers in Illinois and provides electronic banking services such as online and mobile banking. The company focuses on individual customers and small to medium-sized businesses in its market area.

catalysts.sentence: On July 1, 2025, we completed our previously announced acquisition of Bancorp Financial, Inc. (Bancorp Financial), pursuant to the agreement and plan of merger dated February 24, 2025.

catalysts.event: Branch purchase from First Merchants Bank closed
catalysts.sentence: On December 6, 2024, we closed on our branch purchase and assumption agreement with First Merchants Bank (FRME).
